name: Modular AI Domain Registry
description: Lightweight, swappable domain packs for an on-device modular AI. The model runs locally; packs are fetched on demand.

packs.name: Programming
packs.description: Writing, explaining, and debugging code across languages. Anything that must be verified to actually run is delegated to a code-runner tool, not trusted from the model.

packs.name: Mathematics
packs.description: Arithmetic, algebra, calculus, and quantitative reasoning. Precise calculation is delegated to a calculator tool, not the model.
